target: 4. A Complicated Relationship
July 23rd
*Yawn*...
(Morning, huh... Are Ushio and Mio already awake?)

Good morning, Shin-chan.
Did you sleep well?
Good morning. Thanks for getting the room ready. I slept great.
…Where's Ushio?
Seems like she's still sleeping.
I see...
I hope you can make up with big sister soon.
(It's not really making up... Ushio just got mad on her own.)

Hey, Shin-chan.
What are you going to do after breakfast?
Since it's been a while, why don't you take a walk around the island?
No, I think I'll help out at Kofune today.
Huh, really!?
With lunch and all, it's a busy time with more tourists, right?
Yeah, thank you. I'd be happy if Shin-chan was there with―― No, I mean it would be reassuring!
We'll see about that. I'll do my best not to drag you down.
It's fine. You know our shop well, Shin-chan.
...*Yaaaawn*.
Ah, good morning, big sister.
Ah… good morning.
Good morning, Ushio.
Good morning, Shinpei.
Huh? Big sister, did you get in a better mood after sleeping on it?
O-Of course not! Seeing Shinpei's face first thing in the morning ruins the start of my day.
But Shin-chan is going to be with us all day today, you know? He said he'd help out at the shop.
Hmph, if Shinpei's there, you don't need me, right? I'll pass on helping at the shop today.

Ushio…
Are you still angry?

Hmph!!
Of course I am!!
I seriously don't get it, but what are you so――
What do you mean you don't get it! If you actually think about it, you should be able to figure it out!
Think about it, you say――
I was actually planning to punch you once.
Plus, I can't believe you suddenly hugged me! I feel like adding two or three more punches!
(Wait, could it be about that!?)
What is it? Suddenly lost in thought...
Ushio, I'm sorry.
Huh?
Um, my bad.
W-What…?
Um... how do I say this... I couldn't really understand... how you felt.
I-Is that so? I see, so you understand a little bit now.
You don't want to hug a guy like me, right. Sorry, Ushio.
That's not what this is about!!
Ah~~, there's no talking to you! In the end, you didn't understand at all!

Wait, wait!
Then why are you angry!?
I'm telling you! Figure that out for yourself!
But the conclusion I came to was wrong!
I don't care! I don't care! I don't care about you anymore, Shinpei!
Ah! Big sister, where are you going!?
I'm going back to sleep in my room! Don't bother me!
H-Hey...
Oh, it's lively this early in the morning.
Good morning, Dad! Alright, good night!
Good night? It's morning, you know? You're going to sleep now?
I'm going back to sleep!
What's wrong with her?
She wasn't in a good mood last night either, did you guys fight again?
Ah, probably... Honestly, I don't really get it, though.
Hahaha, looks like this one is going to drag on.
Sorry, Shin-chan. Maybe I teased her too much.
Don't worry about it. It's fine, I'll figure something out.
(Even though I said that...)
(This time, I really can't seem to figure out what Ushio is thinking.)
(That idiot... Why is she so angry?)
